title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 541.060 - Receipt of stolen or embezzled property — trial, where held
text:
541.060.  Receipt of stolen or embezzled property — trial, where held. — When any person shall be liable to prosecution as the receiver of any personal property that shall have been feloniously stolen, taken or embezzled, he may be indicated, tried and convicted in any county where he received or had such property, notwithstanding such theft or embezzlement was committed in another county.
(RSMo 1939 § 3768) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3378; 1919 § 3723; 1909 § 4934
